title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Each time the barrel lever is pulled, it adds one barrel to the bottom of the stack and one falls out the top. The system holds 20 barrels so there can be 6 barrels rolling down at a time.
caption: output/2026-07-23/lego-s-donkey-kong-arcade-machine-lets-mario-jump-endless-barrels-miya.txt
